case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES VS LABAYEN, ENRICO

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 491982 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT LABAYEN, ENRICO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LABAYEN, ENRICO $789.65 PRINCIPAL, $762.53 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,566.18, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE NO. 491982. JUDGMENT RENDERED ON 8/24/89;MAILED 8/29/89. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
